description_long: This is a rugged, military-style SUV painted in matte olive green, featuring a boxy body with four doors and blacked-out windows. The vehicle is heavily modified for off-road or expedition use, with large, armored wheel covers and a sturdy metal step ladder on each side. The roof is loaded with various cargo items, including duffel bags, a jerry can, and a large cylindrical container, all secured with a metal roof rack. The front of the SUV is equipped with four round headlights and a robust grille, while the rear has a spare tire mounted on the back door and a weathered rear window. The left side of the vehicle displays a white star emblem, suggesting a military or paramilitary affiliation. The overall appearance is utilitarian and robust, designed for challenging environments rather than urban luxury.
description: A matte olive green, military-style SUV with armored wheel covers, roof cargo, and a rugged, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the step ladder, roof cargo, and a white star emblem on the rear door.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the four round headlights, wide grille, and the stacked cargo on the roof.
description_view_2: Right side view with visible step ladder, roof cargo, and a spare tire mounted at the rear.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the spare tire, weathered rear window, and the back end of the roof cargo.
